description: A developer has requested the deployment of an NGINX reverse proxy in the 'dmz' namespace. Using the configuration file located at /home/ga/Desktop/proxy_values.yaml, deploy the 'nginx' chart from the Bitnami Helm repository (https://charts.bitnami.com/bitnami) with the release name 'corp-proxy' into the 'dmz' namespace. Ensure the proxy successfully starts, runs with 2 replicas, and exposes HTTP on NodePort 30080. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678! to complete the task.
